profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Kobexindo Tractors Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, distributes and services heavy equipment in Indonesia. The company operates through Heavy Equipment, Sparepart, Repair and Maintenance, and Others segments. It offers excavators, wide body trucks, articulated dump trucks, wheel loaders, hydraulic breakers, off-highway trucks, AXOR, and ACTROS and AROCS; off road dump trucks and mining sprinkler water truck; off road dump trucks hybrid; counterbalance forklift trucks, pallet movers, hand pallet electric, towing truck, order pickers, reach truck forklifts, high rack stackers, automatic guide vehicle, racking, electric pallets and stackers, genisys, and safety barriers; VNA equipment and multi-directional forklifts. The company also provides sweepers, vacuum sweeper machines and scrubber-driers, floor scrubber rental, road sweeper rental, and street sweeper rental; macroclean; lighting towers, tracked pavers, pneumatic tyre rollers, soil rollers, and tandem asphalt rollers; and compact excavators, mid-size wheel loader, bulldozer, and motor grader. The company also provides after-sales services; spare parts; and maintenance services consisting of engine and carriage inspection, and oil analysis. It serves the mining, material handling and logistics, environmental, construction, and agriculture sectors. The company was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Jakarta Utara, Indonesia. PT Kobexindo Tractors Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Kobexindo Investama.
